title: Formatting Text with Single Quotes and Backslashes

content.problemStatement:
In this task, you are required to write a Python program that displays a message containing both double quotes and single quotes, using escape characters and a custom separator.

You should reproduce the following output exactly:

`The programmer exclaimed - "It's amazing how Python handles special characters!"
`
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T (1 ≤ T ≤ 100), the number of test cases. No further input is required for each test case.
content.outputFormat:
Print the exact sentence:
The programmer exclaimed - "It's amazing how Python handles special characters!"
once for each test case, each on its own line.

sampleTestCases.output: The programmer exclaimed - \"It's amazing how Python handles special characters!\"
sampleTestCases.explanation: T=1, so the required sentence is printed once.

sampleTestCases.output: The programmer exclaimed - \"It's amazing how Python handles special characters!\"\nThe programmer exclaimed - \"It's amazing how Python handles special characters!\"\nThe programmer exclaimed - \"It's amazing how Python handles special characters!\"
sampleTestCases.explanation: T=3, the sentence is printed three times, each on its own line.

sampleTestCases.output:
The programmer exclaimed - "It's amazing how Python handles special characters!"
The programmer exclaimed - "It's amazing how Python handles special characters!"
The programmer exclaimed - "It's amazing how Python handles special characters!"
The programmer exclaimed - "It's amazing how Python handles special characters!"
The programmer exclaimed - "It's amazing how Python handles special characters!"
sampleTestCases.explanation: T=5, the sentence appears five times.

hidden.label: minimum boundary
hidden.expectedOutput: The programmer exclaimed - \"It's amazing how Python handles special characters!\"

hidden.label: Case 2
hidden.expectedOutput: The programmer exclaimed - \"It's amazing how Python handles special characters!\"

hidden.label: Case 3
hidden.expectedOutput: The programmer exclaimed - \"It's amazing how Python handles special characters!\"

hidden.label: Case 4
hidden.expectedOutput: The programmer exclaimed - \"It's amazing how Python handles special characters!\"

hidden.label: Case 5
hidden.expectedOutput: The programmer exclaimed - \"It's amazing how Python handles special characters!\"

solution.approach: The task does not involve any computation besides reproducing a fixed line. Read the integer T, then loop T times printing the required sentence. Proper escaping of double quotes inside the string literal is needed for each language.
solution.timeComplexity: O(T) – one constant‑time print per test case.
solution.spaceComplexity: O(1) – only a few variables are used regardless of T.
